caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, glasses, large black headphones, and a distinctive, tall, grey, spiky wig. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some hanging clothing, including a yellow shirt with the word "LEE" visible. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a logo reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST," and another logo stating "BOSS TALK 101" appears toward the center. The man remains in a mostly static position throughout the sequence, speaking into the microphone with slight movements of his head and mouth as he talks. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent, capturing his side profile against the textured backdrop of the studio.
